title: Mobile networks now reach most of the population, but many people remain offline
source: International Telecommunication Union, ITU DataHub. Retrieved from Data360 (MOB_COV_3G, WB_WDI_IT_NET_USER_ZS). Data for 2024.
visdescription: A set of four slope charts showing 3G network coverage and Internet access levels for countries, by income group: low, lower-middle, upper-middle, and high-income

_meta.approvalNote: hand layouts; coverage_map is ranked-bars proxy not Mapbox
